blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,033 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
